---
title: "Collaborate"
---

Most of the projects that I am contributing to are open to enthusiastic
and diligent researchers. Please get in touch if you would like to
collaborate.

**Current examples of open projects:**

+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
| Project              | Description          | Tasks                |
+======================+======================+======================+
| [FORRT Replication   | A collection of      | -   Data curation    |
| Hub](https://forrt.o | projects to support  |     and validation   |
| rg/replication-hub/) | repetitive research  |     (volunteer and   |
|                      | across multiple      |     paid work)       |
|                      | disciplines.         |                      |
|                      |                      | -   Programming of   |
|                      |                      |     software tools   |
|                      |                      |                      |
|                      |                      | -   Documentation    |
|                      |                      |     (tutorials,      |
|                      |                      |     video recordings |
|                      |                      |     to facilitate    |
|                      |                      |     use)             |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
| [FReD                | An educational       | -   Data curation    |
| L                    | interface that       |     and validation   |
| ighthouse](https://f | summarizes           |     (volunteer and   |
| orrt.org/reversals/) | replications,        |     paid work)       |
|                      | reproductions,       |                      |
|                      | meta-analyses, and   | -   Website creation |
|                      | comments/critiques   |     (concept and     |
|                      | based on central     |     coding)          |
|                      | findings.            |                      |
|                      |                      | -   Organization of  |
|                      |                      |     community        |
|                      |                      |     meetings to      |
|                      |                      |     crowdsource data |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
| [Replication         | A multidisciplinary, | -   Editorial        |
| Research             | researcher-led,      |     assistance       |
| (R2)](https://www.un | diamond open access  |     (e.g.,           |
| i-muenster.de/Ejourn | journal.             |     copy-editing)    |
| als/index.php/replic |                      |                      |
| ationresearch/index) |                      | -   Reproducibility  |
|                      |                      |     checks           |
|                      |                      |                      |
|                      |                      | -   Call for         |
|                      |                      |     submissions      |
|                      |                      |                      |
|                      |                      | -   Call for         |
|                      |                      |     editorial        |
|                      |                      |     members          |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
| [Open Journal        | Currently, merely a  | -   Data wrangling   |
| Database](https://   | proof of concept     |                      |
| metaanalyses.shinyap | that allows          | -   Website          |
| ps.io/openjournals/) | researchers to       |     development      |
|                      | choose a journal for |     (design and      |
|                      | their articles based |     programming)     |
|                      | on more than just    |                      |
|                      | intransparent        | -   Documentation    |
|                      | citation metrics     |     (tutorial,       |
|                      | such as the journal  |     instructions,    |
|                      | impact factor.       |     scientific       |
|                      |                      |     article)         |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
| [Replication Journal | We are currently     | -   Administration   |
| Federation](htt      | setting up a global  |     (e.g., mailing   |
| ps://forrt.org/rjf/) | network of (open)    |     list creation)   |
|                      | journals that focus  |                      |
|                      | on replication and   | -   Website design   |
|                      | reproduction         |                      |
|                      | studies.             | -   Member           |
|                      |                      |     recruitment      |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
| [Open Science        | I am planning to     | -   Translation      |
| Book](https://l      | translate my German  |                      |
| ukasroeseler.github. | open science book    | -   Coding (R,       |
| io/opensciencebuch/) | into English.        |     Quarto Markdown, |
|                      |                      |     quartobabel      |
|                      |                      |     package)         |
|                      |                      |                      |
|                      |                      | -   Support in       |
|                      |                      |     publishing the   |
|                      |                      |     book at the      |
|                      |                      |     local library    |
+----------------------+----------------------+----------------------+
